IMPORTANT: TR270B track width is 12.6 in (320 mm) — significantly narrower than TR310B (400 mm) and TR340B (450 mm). This is the smallest/narrowest CASE CTL undercarriage. Ground pressure estimated higher (~5.1 psi) as a result. High-flow 32.4 gpm. No DEF. 74 hp. Fuel tank 19.5 gal (smaller tank shared with TR310B).

90 hp = DEF required (SCR). Best-sourced CTL entry in this batch — skidsteerloaderspecs.com has full spec sheet for TR340B. Ground pressure 4.4 psi confirmed. Enhanced high-flow: 35 gpm @ 4,000 psi. TR = radial lift. Operating weight cited as ~10,000 lbs; some sources say 9,800–10,200 depending on cab config.

Super Boom vertical lift. No DEF. Breakout forces: bucket 7,360 lbs, boom 6,110 lbs (confirmed from West Hills Tractor). records.notes: First-generation SVL65 (Tier 3 / pre-Tier4). Replaced by SVL65-2 in April 2019. Radial lift. No DEF. OEM documentation no longer hosted by Kubota USA. All specs reconstructed from third-party aggregators and archived dealer sheets — treat as LOW confidence and require manual review before publishing. Do NOT confuse with SVL65-2 (vertical lift, 2019+).
First-generation SVL75 (Tier 3 engine V3307-TE3). Vertical lift. No DEF. No high-flow option. Replaced by SVL75-2 ~2016. Source: skidsteerloaderspecs.com cross-referenced with OEM-era dealer sheets.

Radial lift. Posi-Track undercarriage. Tier 4 Final. Engine: Kubota D1803-CR-T 37.5 gross HP. No DEF. 11" tracks. SINGLE-SPEED only — no two-speed transmission. No high-flow, no ride control. Source: Official ASV OEM spec sheet ASV_RT40.pdf (asvi.com, March 2018).

Radial lift. Posi-Track undercarriage. IMPORTANT: Two engine generations exist. (1) Original Perkins 404D-22 50 HP, ROC 1600 lbs — spec sheet date Sept 2016. (2) Yanmar-powered 53.8 HP, ROC 1400 lbs — introduced ~2022. This record reflects the original Perkins variant. No DEF. No high-flow. Single speed (7.1 mph max, single-speed). 15" tracks. Source: Official ASV OEM spec sheet ASV_RT50.pdf.

Radial lift. Posi-Track. Tier 4 Final. Original version: Deutz TCD2.2 T4F 67 HP. Later refreshed with Yanmar engine (67.1 HP). No DEF. 15" tracks. Two-speed (up to 10.6 mph). High-flow optional. Source: Official ASV RT65_SellSheet-4.pdf (original Deutz version).

Radial lift. Posi-Track. Tier 4 Final. Engine: Cummins QSF3.8 120 gross HP. DEF required (SCR). 18" tracks. Two-speed (6 / 10 mph). Hydraulic flow is variable: std 0-20 gpm / high 30-45 gpm. Rear-view camera standard. Hinge pin, dump height, reach values read from dimension diagram in spec sheet — not in tabular form, marked manual_review. Source: Official ASV OEM spec sheet ASV_RT120.pdf (asvi.com, May 2016).
